title: "Delete an employee's work address"

  children={"Delete an employee's work address"}
>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/v1/work_addresses/{work_address_uuid}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Used for deleting an employee's work address. Cannot delete the employee's active work address.

scope: `employees:manage`
